title: frontend: Export ApiError from K8s package for plugin access
author: Rohith-Saran

findings.description: Commit subject missing SubArea segment. Expected: 'frontend: k8s: Export ApiError from K8s package for plugin access'. Project convention requires area: SubArea: Description.

Three storyshot files contain unrelated structural ARIA-element changes (aria-live divs, 'No results found' text) not related to the ApiError export. Likely snapshot drift from base branch. Regenerate from clean main or explain these changes.
Minimal fix: one export + one Vite mapping correctly resolves the plugin crash. pluginLib.snapshot confirms ApiError is now accessible under K8s namespace.
